libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Use jakarta.activation imports and types for version 2.0.0; do not keep or add javax.activation compatibility imports to make the old 1.2.1 tests compile. No Docker image, environment variable, or system property setup appears necessary.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8769 [Automation] javac compile fails for jakarta.activation:jakarta.activation-api:2.0.0; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: The implementation artifact also contains jakarta.activation API classes, so tests should still be written against the 2.0.0 jakarta.activation API surface rather than relying on old javax.activation classes.
Local Gradle and native-image verification remain authoritative for classpath ordering and reachability metadata behavior.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Jakarta Activation API 2.0.0 moved the public package from javax.activation to jakarta.activation, and the API jar has runtime references to com.sun.activation.registries classes needed for normal command-map and MIME-type-map usage.
